✦ a very special day ✦

Happy Birthday

To Anshika🎀
✦ Memories ✦
Smiling bright ✨
On the way 🌿
Lunchtime vibes 🍱
Pepsi moment 🥤
Sunshine girl ☀️

On this beautiful day, the stars aligned
just to celebrate you — someone so rare,
so warm, so wonderful.

May every wish you've whispered
find its way to you,
and may this year be filled with
joy, love & magic 💙

With all the love in the universe ✨
